keywords.name: I called Bencthyclthrtrprr by me people. Lil' ones me call Big Ben.
keywords.tibia: One day I'll go and look.
keywords.ab'dendriel: Me parents live here before town was. Me not care about lil' ones.
keywords.big: Mountain in south. Lil' lil' ones living there.
keywords.old: Mountain in south. Lil' lil' ones living there.
keywords.elves: Me not fight them, they not fight me.
keywords.humans: Always asking me for stuff they can't afford.
keywords.orcs: Silly ones. Not talk much. Always screaming and hitting.
keywords.minotaurs: They were friend with me parents. Long before elves here, they often made visit. No longer come here.
keywords.dwarfs: Lil' lil' ones are so fun. We often chat.
keywords.lil: Lil' lil' ones are so fun. We often chat.
keywords.god: You shut up. Me not want to hear.
keywords.steel: Manny kinds of. Like Mesh Kaha Rogh, Za'Kalortith, Uth'Byth, Uth'Morc, Uth'Amon, Uth'Maer, Uth'Doon, and Zatragil
keywords.Mesh: Steel that is singing when forged. No one knows where find today.
keywords.Kaha: Steel that is singing when forged. No one knows where find today.
keywords.Rogh: Steel that is singing when forged. No one knows where find today.
keywords.Za'Kalortith: It's evil. Demon iron is. No good cyclops goes where you can find and need evil flame to melt.
keywords.Uth'Byth: Not good to make stuff off. Bad steel it is. But eating magic, so useful is.
keywords.Uth'Morc: Lil' ones it thieves' steel call sometimes. It's dark and making not much noise.
keywords.Uth'Amon: Brigthsteel is. Much art made with it. Sorcerers to lazy and afraid to enchant much.
keywords.Uth'Maer: Heartiron from heart of big old mountain, found very deep. Lil' lil ones fiercely defend. Not wanting to have it used for stuff but holy stuff.
keywords.Uth'Doon: It's high steel called. Only lil' lil' ones know how make.
keywords.Zatragil: Most ancients use dream silver for different stuff. Now ancients most gone. Most not know about.
keywords.Teshial: Is one of elven family or such thing. Me not understand lil' ones and their busisness.
keywords.Deraisim: Is one of elven family or such thing. Me not understand lil' ones and their busisness.
keywords.Cenath: Is one of elven family or such thing. Me not understand lil' ones and their busisness.
keywords.Kuridai: Is one of elven family or such thing. Me not understand lil' ones and their busisness.
keywords.cyclops: Me people not live here much. Most are far away.
keywords.excalibug: Me wish I could make weapon like it.
keywords.fire: Do lil' one want to trade a fire sword?
keywords.sword: Do lil' one want to trade a serpent sword?
keywords.bright: Do lil' one want to trade a bright sword?
keywords.word: Do lil' one want to trade a bright sword?
keywords.warlord: Do lil' one want to trade a warlord sword?
keywords.of: Do lil' one want to trade a sword of valor?
keywords.valor: Do lil' one want to trade a sword of valor?
keywords.serpent: Do lil' one want to trade a serpent sword?
keywords.enchanted: Do lil' one want to trade an enchanted plate armor?
keywords.plate: Do lil' one want to trade an enchanted plate armor?
keywords.dragon: Do lil' one want to trade a dragon shield?
keywords.shield: Do lil' one want to trade a dragon shield?

entries.response: You not have stuff me want for.
